newsSince: No new fundamental catalyst since June 9. The June 3 750V SiC MOSFET BBU design win for +/-400V HVDC AI servers and the GS-endorsed AI/DC growth target were already in the June 9 cases. The DENSO takeover bid was withdrawn back in March. +3.85% move is modest; rerating already consumed per prior verdicts.

sources.label: ROHM 750V SiC MOSFET adopted in AI-server BBU (Semiconductor Today)
ROHM SiC BBU / HVDC AI servers (GlobeNewswire)

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha/passives lens: current-sense/resistor exposure unchanged; the GS-upgrade recognition event was already marked down June 9. No new passives-specific evidence since. +130% YTD remains crowded. Hold at 0 after the prior down.
verdicts.bull: Tight-supply current-sense and chip-resistor content rising with AI server density.
verdicts.neutral: GS upgrade and rerating already priced; nothing new on passives since June 9.
verdicts.bear: +139% YTD on a crowding-sensitive list; residual mispricing largely consumed.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: AI-server power-node content gains in resistors/current sense.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded ownership; SiC pricing/auto-cycle drag on the broader story.

verdicts.rankRationale: Network-centrality lens: the June 3 HVDC/BBU SiC design win that raised ROHM's directness to the DC power node is already in the score. No fresh window evidence; +3.85% is minor. Hold rather than whipsaw after the June 9 hold.
verdicts.bull: 750V SiC into +/-400V HVDC AI-server BBUs gives a real, growing DC-power-node foothold.
verdicts.neutral: Design win already priced; less direct than HBM/packaging/networking names.
verdicts.bear: Analog/power is a step removed from the core AI-node bottleneck; SiC margins still recovering.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: HVDC AI-server SiC adoption scaling toward FY30 DC targets.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO lens: ROHM is power/SiC, not co-packaged optics; flagged for removal June 8 on weak direct CPO/HBM/packaging relevance. No new window evidence changes that. Hold at the bottom of the list.
verdicts.bull: Strong SiC power franchise with AI-server BBU traction.
verdicts.neutral: Essentially no CPO relevance; sits low for a reason.
verdicts.bear: Weak direct optics/packaging fit; high YTD worsens asymmetry on this lens.

verdicts.rankRationale: Master under-owned-bottleneck lens: board-level power thesis is now consensus (doubled GS target, +139% YTD) and was marked down June 9 on that. No genuinely new info since, so no further move; hold at 0.
verdicts.bull: Power-delivery/SiC content into AI servers with a validated HVDC design win.
verdicts.neutral: Bottleneck exposure now recognized and priced; new-info pulse has faded.
verdicts.bear: Under-owned-bottleneck edge largely gone at +139% YTD; execution/pricing risk remains.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Sustained SiC AI-server adoption and earnings rebound.
